book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Ex-Conscript
summary: Strong swimming and scaling charge benefits replace fast movement and defensive features.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Ship's Officer
notes: Best officer chassis in the book.
summary: Inspire courage plus ship-wide pennant/banner support.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Marine
summary: Maritime skills, shipboard terrain mobility, pirate weapon training, and late overboard bull rush.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Sea Dog
summary: Uses rigging for temporary flight and firearm attacks to manipulate ship rigging.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Ship Hunter
summary: Focuses an enemy vessel for scaling attack/damage and can scuttle ships at 20th.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Picaroon
summary: Unarmored swashbuckling magus with canny defense and rogue talents at substantial class-feature cost.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Seaswain
notes: Not recommended as a Demidius multiclass.
summary: Charisma-based nautical monk with weapon flurry, surface-running, execution strike, and elemental transformation.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Crown Privateer
summary: Expands paladin auras and sacred defenses to all allies aboard the same ship.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Navigator
summary: Cuts voyage time or encounter risk, improves crew initiative/awareness, and grants ship-related rerolls.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Lookout
summary: Improves long-range Perception and exposes illusions with extra saves and ally support.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Basket Hilt
summary: Improves CMD against disarm/sunder and gives +1 shield AC on total defense.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Belaying Pin
summary: Common shipboard simple club and backup weapon.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Cutlass
summary: One-handed 18–20/x2 slashing weapon with utility against rope, cloth, leather, and wood.

book: Advanced Options: Fight Like a Pirate
name: Mariner's Armor
summary: Half weight and improved mobility, with reduced normal AC but full protection under cover and vs critical confirmations.

name: Addict
summary: Drug dependency; lower-level oracle spells use the highest available spell level when determining save DC.

name: Ailing
summary: Fatigue and illness liabilities; adds fatigue/exhaustion debuff spells known.

name: Amputee
summary: Permanent missing hand; adds illusion and mobility spells through ethereal jaunt.

name: Convulsions
summary: Natural 1s disrupt held items, but grants half oracle level to Reflex saves and Escape Artist.

name: Drunkard
notes: Strong Influence precedent; serious addiction risk.
summary: Alcohol creates stacking Wisdom-check penalties and Charisma-check bonuses up to half oracle level.

name: Frail
summary: Fatigue under injury/ability damage in exchange for extra skill points and class skills.

name: Insomniac
summary: Needs uninterrupted sleep but later downgrades exhaustion and gains strong resistance to sleep/fatigue magic.

name: Misshapen
summary: CMD penalty, scaling Intimidate bonus, and increasingly efficient area demoralization.

name: Peaceful Soul
summary: Weak attacks and no AoOs, but stronger defensive casting and eventual at-will self-sanctuary.

name: Provocative
notes: Dangerous overlap with Demidius's social fatal flaw.
summary: Nonlethal vulnerability in exchange for a large Diplomacy bonus and accelerated attitude influence.

name: Squeamish
summary: Dealing HP damage sickens the oracle; grants strong Heal and disease/poison treatment.

name: Star-Crossed
notes: Directly hostile to Demidius's core strategy.
summary: Natural 11 is an automatic failure and pure chance is biased against the oracle; adds inspiration spells.

name: Unbelievable
summary: Severe penalties when persuading others to accept information; scaling Sense Motive bonus.

name: Accursed
summary: +4 AC against curse attacks and +4 saves against curses.

name: Second Curse
notes: Requires careful pairing and GM review.
summary: Take a second curse and gain its benefits at oracle level –4.

name: Suspend Curse
summary: Sacrifice a spell slot to suppress curse drawbacks for 2 rounds per spell level.

name: Variable Curse
notes: The CL bonus is attractive for dispel, but random liabilities are unacceptable.
summary: Randomly rotate among five curses; gain +1 caster level for oracle spells.

name: Asylum
summary: Sanctuary-like protection for a nonattacking creature.

name: Balm
summary: Fast healing 2, later 3, for 3 + level rounds.

name: Beatific Smile
summary: Scaling morale bonus to one roll category for an ally.

name: Blood Boil
summary: Short-duration rage effect on a touched ally.

name: Bungle
summary: Intelligence-based remote disarm.

name: Catseye
summary: 24-hour low-light vision or darkvision.

name: Entropy
summary: Intelligence-based sunder dealing 2d6 + level to an item.

name: Familiar Growth
summary: Turns a familiar into an animal-companion-like combat form.

name: Gremlin
summary: Intelligence-based remote grapple without becoming grappled.

name: Hobble
summary: Intelligence-based remote trip.

name: Medusa Locks
summary: Intelligence-based natural hair attack usable while grappled.

name: Scuttle
summary: Scaling climb mastery and eventual climb speed.

name: Shadows
summary: Creates enforced dim light that magic light cannot fully negate.

name: Wail
summary: Intelligence-based remote bull rush.

name: Whispers
summary: Grants half witch level to one skill, with duration based on the skill.

name: Will-O'-Wisp
summary: Hour-long light granting +4, later +8, Perception in its area.

name: Ally
summary: Material-component-free lesser planar ally, upgrading to planar ally.

name: Cornucopia
summary: Enhanced provisions; later long-duration heroes' feast.

name: Doom Gaze
summary: Penalty to AC, checks, attacks, saves, or skills; scales to –8 at 16th.

name: Infestation
summary: Controlled swarm with scaling luck bonuses.

name: Kiss of Oblivion
summary: Modify memory through a kiss.

name: Mock
summary: Staggers a target for level rounds, with repeated saves and once/day targeting.

name: Restoration
summary: Lesser restoration, neutralize poison, remove disease; later heal-like condition removal.

name: Rune Hex
summary: Stores a known hex in a touch/read-triggered rune.

name: Allure
summary: Sympathy centered on the witch.

name: Kiss of Death
summary: Finger of death through a kiss.

name: Retainers
summary: Leadership-like retainers, adding Intelligence to score and replacing cohort with multiple special retainers.

name: Shapeshift
summary: Shapechange without focus for 5 minutes/level per day.

name: Wish Giver
summary: Grant another creature a limited wish once/day without material component.

name: Enlarge Hex
summary: Double the range of a non-touch hex several times/day.

name: Hex Expertise
summary: Use a selected once-per-24-hours hex twice on the same target.

name: Hex Focus
summary: Increase one selected hex's save DC by 2.

name: Quicken Hex
summary: Use a hex as a swift action once/day; later works on a major hex.

name: Airburst Rocket
summary: Area rocket bomb with 60-foot range and 20-foot splash radius.

name: Amphibious Mutagen
summary: Mutagen grants swim speed and underwater breathing.

name: Barb Bomb
summary: Bomb halves movement until healed or barbs are removed.

name: Blinding Bomb
summary: Replaces bomb damage with permanent blindness on direct hit and 1-round splash blindness.

name: Burst Bomb
summary: Bomb explodes as a 20-foot cone centered adjacent to the alchemist.

name: Chitinous Mutagen
summary: Mutagen grants +4 enhancement natural armor.

name: Cliffwalking Mutagen
summary: Mutagen grants climb speed equal to half base speed.

name: Deafening Bomb
summary: Bomb permanently deafens on a failed Fortitude save.

name: Essence of Aberration
summary: Mutagen gains 50% critical/sneak negation and darkvision.

name: Essence of the Cheetah
summary: Mutagen grants +30-foot haste bonus to speed, capped at double speed.

name: Essence of the Eagle
summary: Mutagen grants low-light vision and +4 sight-based Perception.

name: Essence of the Wolf
summary: Mutagen grants scent.

name: Explosive Trap
summary: Turns a bomb into a proximity trap with high detection/disarm DC.

name: High Explosive
summary: Spend two bombs for two additional damage dice.

name: Homunculus
summary: Gain a homunculus familiar, replaceable for 1,000 gp and one day.

name: Minibomb
summary: Reduce bomb damage by two dice to spend only half a daily bomb use.

name: Phantom Mutagen
summary: Mutagen grants greater invisibility at class level.

name: Potent Extract
summary: Treat extract caster level as 2 higher.

name: Preserved Extract
summary: Increase extract durations over 1 round by 50%.

name: Rocket
summary: Bomb range 40 feet, or 60 feet with one less damage die.

name: Vital Extract
summary: Every consumed extract heals Intelligence modifier, capped by extract level.

name: Volatile Bomb
summary: Bombs gain 19–20 threat range, improving with Improved Critical.

name: Durable Creations
summary: Makes spagyric devices much harder to break or removes their energy vulnerability.

name: Esoteric Studies
summary: Select two spells per class level from any list to expand item prerequisites for devices.

name: Mass Production
summary: Duplicate devices count at half and then quarter cost against the daily device limit.

name: Metamorph
summary: Once/day polymorph or baleful polymorph through metamorphosis.

name: Noble Metamorphosis
summary: Improves daily base-material conversion value.

name: Royal Metamorphosis
summary: Further improves daily base-material conversion value.

name: Ultimate Metamorph
summary: Once/day polymorph any object.

name: Spagyric Devices
notes: Extremely strong infrastructure feature; requires GM scrutiny.
summary: Replace bombs, mutagen, or extracts with a daily reconfigurable pool of magic-item-like devices based on a level-scaled gp limit.

name: Metamorphosis
summary: Replace a core alchemy feature with material transmutation plus ranged deterioration/transfiguration effects.

name: Extra Devices
summary: Use the spagyric gp limit of an alchemist one level higher.

name: Extra Metamorphosis
summary: Gain two additional great metamorphosis uses/day; stackable.
